visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female host with a white bucket hat, white long-sleeved top, and blue jeans stands in a warehouse supermarket aisle, holding two boxed plush toy sets (a pink rabbit and a blue lamb). She smiles warmly at the camera. The background shows rows of shelving and shoppers. (2) The host shifts the boxes to show their sides while continuing to smile and talk enthusiastically. The camera maintains a medium full shot of her. (3) The camera zooms in to a medium shot as she gestures excitedly with the products. (4) The host turns toward a large pallet display of the products, pointing at the stacks of blue boxes. (5) A close-up shot of the blue lamb plush set inside its packaging, clearly showing the 'HoneyPads' brand and the text '3 Piece Baby Blanket & Toy Gift Set'. (6) The host returns to the center frame, holding the sets and looking directly into the lens with high energy.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 大家搶著買. [Slogan]: 黑五好康. [Subtitle]: 超美花布布偶寶寶毯 扯爆只要359元! (2) [Subtitle]: 之前分享效果超好的寶寶毯毯 (3) [Subtitle]: 好市多黑五這次有特價 (4) [Subtitle]: 原本459這次折90元 (5) [Subtitle]: 只要359 (6) [Subtitle]: 本來就很便宜了現在 (7) [Subtitle]: 哇你一定要入 (8) [Subtitle]: 而且好市多因為覺得它銷量很好 (9) [Subtitle]: 它準備了四大箱在賣耶 (10) [Subtitle]: 那有可愛的小羊 (11) [Subtitle]: 然後跟兔子以及白色的小熊 (12) [Subtitle]: 那它這是一個娃娃裡面有被被 (13) [Subtitle]: 還有一個掛包三件組 (14) [Subtitle]: 現在一個只要100出頭 (15) [Subtitle]: 你之前沒有入手現在絕對可以直接入手 (16) [Subtitle]: 送禮最佳360元滿滿的一整組喔 (17) [Subtitle]: 送禮自用兩相宜

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female host as the main creator
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a white 'NY' branded bucket hat, a white knit long-sleeve top, a brown cross-body bag, and light blue denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Large warehouse-style retail environment with high ceilings, industrial lighting, and massive metal shelving units filled with various products in large quantities.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female vocals enter with an animated and cheerful tone, supported by a bright acoustic guitar-driven pop background music. The audio is crisp with minimal background hum. (2) A subtle 'ding' sound effect highlights the mention of a price. The female voice maintains a fast speech rate with high pitch variability, emphasizing specific promotional words. (3) Slight rustling of product packaging can be heard beneath the narration as the host moves. The music remains steady in volume and tempo. (4) The recording concludes with the music fading out gently after the final enthusiastic call to action.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Price Comparison -> Feature Detail -> CTA.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and promote a specific baby blanket and toy gift set available at Costco during the Black Friday sale, emphasizing the value, variety, and gift-worthiness of the product.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products, mention of specific store name (Costco), and highlight of a promotional price.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical high-energy shopping vlog optimized for social media with clear subtitles and a direct focus on value-for-money deals.
